name: TA-65 metabolic syndrome completed registry
summary: Completed randomized double-masked crossover TA-65 registry in metabolic syndrome, with insulin resistance, oxidative stress, and inflammation endpoints.
population: Estimated 40 adults aged 32 to 70 years with metabolic syndrome

trial_details.watch_status_reason: Registry text records actual completion in 2017-2018 and the June 10, 2026 check still found no posted results; keep out of active anticipation until structured dates or a retirement sweep are added.
trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry listed actual primary completion in December 2017 and actual study completion in June 2018, but had no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Completed no-results registry context, not evidence of benefit.
trial_details.why_it_matters: This record preserves a completed TA-65 metabolic registry as a future publication/results watch item while preventing it from being mistaken for positive evidence.
